title: Student Record System
subtitle: HTML Lists & Tables
description: A structured HTML page displaying student records using ordered lists, unordered lists, and styled tables. Features department, year, section data with CSS color theming.

title: Online Book Store
subtitle: Multi-Page Static Website
description: A full multi-page online bookstore with home page (3-frame layout), login page, catalogue with book inventory table, and user registration form.

title: iFrame Anchor Navigation
subtitle: Anchor Tags & iFrame Display
description: An HTML page that uses anchor tags to load linked content dynamically inside an iframe, including image display using the tag.

title: Student Info Form
subtitle: HTML Form Collection
description: A complete HTML form collecting student info: Name, Email, Branch (dropdown), Gender (radio buttons), and Address (textarea) with POST method submission.

title: Map with Hot Spots
subtitle: Image Maps & Frames
description: A web page embedding a map with clickable hot spot regions using HTML image maps (<area> tags with shape/coords), frames, and navigation links.

title: CSS Stylesheets Demo
subtitle: Inline, Internal & External CSS
description: A live interactive demonstration of all three CSS types: inline styles applied directly in HTML tags, internal CSS via <style> blocks, and external .css file linking.

title: Animated Student Card
subtitle: CSS Keyframe Animation
description: Student record displayed as an animated card using @keyframes: card slides in from top (translateY + opacity), title glows continuously with color + text-shadow transitions.

title: Registration Form Validator
subtitle: JavaScript Form Validation
description: Full client-side validation: First Name (alphabets, min 6 chars), Password (min 6 chars), Email (regex pattern), Mobile (exactly 10 digits), Last Name & Address (not empty).

title: Mouse Event Handler
subtitle: DOM Event Handling
description: Interactive element responding to mouseover (green + white), mouseout (reset), and click events using JavaScript DOM manipulation to change styles and display messages.

title: Number to Words
subtitle: JavaScript Logic & Validation
description: Converts any number (0–999) into English words. Validates: digits only, max 3 digits, alphabets/special chars rejected. Handles units, teens, tens, and hundreds.

title: Employee Manager
subtitle: Objects, Arrays & Functions
description: JavaScript Employee objects stored in an array with properties: ID, Name, Designation, Salary. Functions display records in a styled table and calculate total salary expenditure.

title: AJAX Student Data Loader
subtitle: AJAX + JSON Dynamic Fetch
description: Fetches student records from students.json using the Fetch API (AJAX). Parses JSON and renders student cards dynamically without any page reload.
